models.architecture: Gradient-boosted decision trees with monotonic constraints
models.input: Formula composition, market segment, target region, supply chain features (42 features total)
models.training_set: 8,400 commercial fragrance formulas with validated market outcomes

models.architecture: Multi-output tree ensemble with interaction constraints
models.input: Ingredient interactions, pH, solubility, light sensitivity, oxidation potential (28 features)
models.training_set: 15,200 accelerated aging test results across 3,100 formulas

models.architecture: 6-layer transformer encoder with learned positional encoding, supervised by GC-MS olfactory data
models.training_set: 4,900 fragrance ingredients with human sensory panel evaluations

models.architecture: Generator-discriminator with policy gradient reward on sensory, cost, and compliance scores
models.input: Target accord description (text) + constraints (cost ceiling, IFRA limits, sustainability preferences)
models.training_set: 22,000 professional accords from IFF, Givaudan, Firmenich, Symrise — public formulations only

models.architecture: Mistral-7B fine-tuned on fragrance market reports, social media fragrance discourse, and IFRA regulatory timelines
models.input: Market segment, region, time horizon, consumer demographic (natural language)
models.training_set: ~2.1M documents (market reports 2018-2026, perfume blogs, regulatory updates)

fusion.explainability: SHAP values on ensemble predictions, LIME for individual model decisions

recommendation_types.label: Ingredient Substitution
recommendation_types.description: Find chemically and sensorially equivalent alternatives with better cost, compliance, or availability profiles

alternatives.name: Iso E Super (Synthetic)
alternatives.sensory_notes: Slightly less woody depth; compensate with 0.5% Cedrol

alternatives.name: Ambroxan (Synthetic)
alternatives.sensory_notes: Slightly more marine character; aligns with current fresh-aquatic trend

alternatives.name: Cedramber (Synthetic Blend)
alternatives.sensory_notes: Drier amber wood profile; may shift accord character slightly

response.reasoning: MAT-4521 (Natural Sandalwood Oil, $20.10/kg) shows 82.3% molecular similarity to Iso E Super at 38.2% cost reduction. Sensory panel data (n=47) confirms minimal hedonic difference (d' = 0.23). IFRA 51st Amendment compliance verified. Recommend MAT-7812 as primary alternative with Cedrol micro-adjustment for depth preservation.

recommendation_types.label: Cost Reduction
recommendation_types.description: Optimize formula cost while preserving sensory profile and compliance

response.stability_impact: Negligible; accelerated aging simulation shows 98.7% profile retention at 12 months
response.reasoning: Identified 3 high-cost naturals with structurally similar synthetic bases. Rose Givco 222 shows 0.94 cosine similarity in embedding space. Jasmine Absolute replacement preserves indolic character within consumer detection threshold. Orris Butter reduction compensated by increased Ionone Alpha (MAT-4410) at 0.15%.

recommendation_types.label: Compliance Optimization
recommendation_types.description: Ensure formula meets IFRA, REACH, CLP, and regional regulatory requirements

recommendation_types.label: Stability Improvement
recommendation_types.description: Predict and prevent degradation, discoloration, and olfactory drift over shelf life

output.predicted_shelf_life: Months under standard and accelerated conditions

recommendation_types.label: Market Positioning
recommendation_types.description: Analyze competitive landscape and suggest optimal positioning strategy

recommendation_types.label: Formula Similarity
recommendation_types.description: Find structurally and sensorially similar formulas in your library for inspiration or gap analysis

recommendation_types.label: Formula Clustering
recommendation_types.description: Discover natural groupings in your formula portfolio by olfactory profile, cost structure, or market performance

output.outlier_formulas: Formulas that don't fit any cluster

recommendation_types.label: Accord Generation
recommendation_types.description: Generate novel fragrance accords from text descriptions using conditional GAN with sensory validation

output.generated_accords: List of ingredient compositions with percentages

recommendation_types.label: Sensory Prediction
recommendation_types.description: Predict hedonic scores, intensity ratings, and consumer preference before physical compounding

recommendation_types.label: Trend Analysis
recommendation_types.description: Identify emerging olfactory trends from market data, social media, and regulatory shifts

scale.description: Calibrated probability that the recommendation, if implemented, achieves the stated outcome

tiers.label: Very High Confidence
tiers.action: Safe to implement; extensive evidence supports recommendation

tiers.label: High Confidence
tiers.action: Recommended; validate with one small-batch trial

tiers.label: Moderate Confidence
tiers.action: Proceed with caution; requires 2-3 validation batches

tiers.label: Low Confidence
tiers.action: Exploratory; treat as hypothesis for R&D investigation

tiers.label: Speculative
tiers.action: Insufficient data; recommendation suppressed unless explicitly requested

calibration.method: Isotonic Regression with Platt Scaling Fallback

uncertainty.reporting: All predictions include 95% confidence intervals computed via bootstrapping (n=1000)
